summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sites and Projects pages. All backend APIs (20/21 tests passed, 1 skipped) and frontend UI flows working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Sites.tsx line 697: Using browser confirm() instead of a proper confirmation dialog component - consider using AlertDialog from shadcn/ui for better UX
Projects.tsx: The 'Edit' button in Sites detail sheet (line 689-692) doesn't have an onClick handler - it's non-functional
test_credentials: Admin demo account button on login page
seed_data_creation: None - used existing migrated sites (8 sites) and test projects (8 projects)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sites and Projects pages fully functional. Sites migration already ran (8 sites created from jobs). Backend test file created at /app/backend/tests/test_sites_projects.py covering all CRUD operations for sites, projects, and customers APIs.

sites_page.stats_cards: PASS - Shows Total Sites (8), Residential (8), Commercial (0), With Pets (0)
sites_page.import_from_jobs_button: PASS - Triggers migration, shows toast 'Migration complete: 0 sites created'
sites_page.add_site_dialog: PASS - Opens dialog with all fields (Customer, Site Type, Name, Address, City, State, ZIP, Access Instructions, Gate Code, Parking Notes, Has Pets toggle, Notes)
sites_page.site_cards: PASS - 8 site cards displayed with customer name, address, job count
sites_page.site_detail_sheet: PASS - Opens on card click with Info, Jobs, Equipment tabs
sites_page.info_tab: PASS - Shows address, Edit and Delete buttons
sites_page.jobs_tab: PASS - Shows job history with job number, type, status

projects_page.stats_cards: PASS - Shows Total Projects (8), In Progress (0), Scheduled (0), Completed (0)
projects_page.new_project_button: PASS - Opens Create Install Project dialog
projects_page.new_project_dialog: PASS - Shows Link to Job dropdown, Project Name, Description, Customer, Site Address, Start/End Date, Estimated Hours/Cost, Notes
projects_page.project_cards: PASS - 8 project cards with project number, name, customer, address, progress bar, timeline, days, phases, budget
projects_page.gantt_button: PASS - Navigates to /projects/{id} with Gantt chart view
projects_page.gantt_page: PASS - Shows project header, stats (Timeline, Hours, Resources, Phases), calendar view, Add Phase button

backend_apis.GET /api/projects/gantt-data/{id}: PASS - Returns Gantt data with project, phases, resources
backend_apis.POST /api/sites + DELETE: SKIPPED - No customers available in test
